---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for bilingual Astro knowledge sites.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What workflow or maintenance problem would this solve?

## Use Case

Who benefits from this change?

- [ ] Documentation or knowledge-base maintainers
- [ ] Bilingual content editors
- [ ] Astro site developers
- [ ] Open-source contributors
- [ ] Other:

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Verification Plan

How should maintainers confirm the change works?

- [ ] `pnpm run verify`
- [ ] Route or demo smoke check
- [ ] Documentation review
- [ ] Other:

## Boundary Check

Does this require private data, a commercial integration, or a specific
production provider?

- [ ] No private content or brand-specific assets are required.
- [ ] No paid, analytics, or commerce integration is required.
- [ ] The feature can remain generic for bilingual Astro knowledge sites.
